catalog.title: Document templates
catalog.subtitle: Answer the questions — the system prepares the legal document and delivers it as a PDF. Every document carries a unique verification code.

apply.title: Join as a lawyer
apply.subtitle: Once your details are verified, your profile goes live on the platform.
apply.biosTitle: About you — in each selected language
apply.biosHelp: Write a short introduction for each language you claim (min 20 characters) — clients will see your profile in that language.
apply.docsNote: Used only for verification; never shown on your public profile.

apply.eAreasMax: You can select at most 5 areas.
apply.eIdDoc: Upload a scan of your ID.

admRec.title: Meeting recordings
admRec.subtitle: Recordings are ready minutes after the meeting and kept for 30 days. Links are valid for 10 minutes.

errors.DEFAULT: Something went wrong.

admT.subtitle: Submitting the same slug creates a new version of the template. Clients always get the latest; old orders stay pinned to theirs.

BOOKING_DECLINED.title: Lawyer declined
BOOKING_DECLINED.body: The {when} meeting won't take place — you get a full refund.

DISPUTE_OPENED.title: New complaint
DISPUTE_OPENED.body: A complaint was opened for the {when} meeting — you have 2 days to respond.

REQUEST_EXPIRED_CLIENT.title: Request went unanswered
REQUEST_EXPIRED_CLIENT.body: The lawyer didn't respond within {hours}h — you get a full refund.

REQUEST_EXPIRED_LAWYER.title: Request expired
REQUEST_EXPIRED_LAWYER.body: The {when} request was cancelled because it went unanswered.

REMINDER_1H.title: Meeting in under an hour
REMINDER_1H.body: The meeting starts at {when} — joining opens soon.

DISPUTE_OVERDUE_LAWYER.title: Complaint response overdue
DISPUTE_OVERDUE_LAWYER.body: Your response is overdue — a decision may be made without it.

DISPUTE_OVERDUE_ADMIN.title: Lawyer didn't respond to complaint
DISPUTE_OVERDUE_ADMIN.body: The {hours}h response window closed — a decision can be made.

meta.siteDesc: Online consultations with verified advocates and lawyers in Azerbaijan.

qa.title: Questions & answers
qa.subtitle: Short answers to common legal questions.

laws.title: Laws & codes
laws.subtitle: Codes and laws of the Republic of Azerbaijan — for reading.
laws.note: Texts are for reference — the official source is e-qanun.az.

areas.title: Practice areas
areas.subtitle: Pick an area — matching lawyers, answers and articles in one place.
areas.intro: Verified {name} lawyers: video and written consultations, transparent prices, live availability.
areas.cta: Describe your case to the AI assistant →
areas.empty: Lawyers in this area are coming soon.

about.title: About us
about.mission: Vakilim.az exists to make legal help in Azerbaijan simple, transparent and accessible. Clients book verified lawyers in a few clicks; lawyers keep full control of their services, prices and schedule.
about.verifyB: Every profile is checked against license and ID documents — published only after approval.
about.pricesB: Prices are visible upfront; no hidden fees.
about.languagesB: The platform works in Azerbaijani, Russian and English.
about.closing: Write to us with questions, suggestions or partnership ideas — every voice makes the platform better.

how.title: How it works
how.c1B: Pick from the directory by area, price and rating — or describe your case to the AI assistant.
how.c2B: Choose a live slot — the meeting takes effect once the lawyer confirms.
how.c3B: Get your video or written consultation; then rate the experience.
how.l1B: Register with your license and ID documents.
how.l2B: After review your profile goes live; you set services and availability.
how.l3B: Accept requests, hold meetings, track earnings in your panel.
how.note: Payments run in simulation during beta; see the laws section for official sources.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a question? Write to us — we usually reply within 48 hours.
contact.emailB: One address for support, feedback and partnerships.
